tasks.subject: Task 1: Add single-loop strict-dedup test
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Append `test_dedup_follower_strict_single_loop` to `tests/test_admission_carveout.py`. 5 concurrent /detect callers on single asyncio loop via httpx.AsyncClient + ASGITransport + asyncio.gather. Strict assertions: 1 acquire, 1 release, 4 DEDUP_HITS, identical bodies.

**Files:**
- Modify (append): `apps-microservices/api-detection-langue-fr/tests/test_admission_carveout.py` (~50 lines)

**Verify:** `pytest apps-microservices/api-detection-langue-fr/tests/test_admission_carveout.py -v` → 13/13 PASS

```json:metadata
{"files": ["apps-microservices/api-detection-langue-fr/tests/test_admission_carveout.py"], "verifyCommand": "python -m pytest apps-microservices/api-detection-langue-fr/tests/test_admission_carveout.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["test appended async + pytest.mark.asyncio", "httpx.AsyncClient + ASGITransport on single loop", "5 strict assertions pass", "DEDUP_HITS delta == 4", "existing 12 tests unchanged"]}
```
